AM25 ecosystem IdP/SSO, built on OAuth2 and OIDC standards

Gate IdP by AM25

Gate IdP is the identity and access layer for the AM25 ecosystem, delivering OAuth2 and OpenID Connect-based authentication and SSO. It is offered as a licensed, managed service, ensuring secure and centralized access across applications.

Details

Category Identity, Auth, SSO
Status Production
Availability Licensed
Stack Node.js, Next.js, PostgreSQL, OAuth2/OIDC
Scope Internal ecosystem
Owner Alejandro Mártir
License Proprietary
  • Private
  • Managed by AM25
  • January 2026
  • March 2026
